title.en: At this moment, the half-tooth wielder pulled o...

content.en:
The half-tooth master began to guide Ye Tian on the path of cultivation in the future.

I saw the half-tooth master and said: "Ye Tian, you should know that after the fifth-level peak Legendary Realm Lord is the half-step Eternal Master, your Supreme Legendary Body has been completed, and then you need to control your Supreme Legendary Body, and if you control it to more than three percent, you will become a half-step Eternal Master, if you control it to more than ten percent, the Supreme Legendary Body will evolve into the Supreme Command Body, and then you will be able to burst out with unparalleled power." At that time, he will have the hope of creating a top-notch space-time control technique, and his strength will be transformed. Moreover, you have obtained the secret of swallowing, and if you devour the essence blood of a powerful life at the level of the Eternal Master, you can also transform your physical fitness again. Of course, you have to wait until you have condensed the Supreme Control Body before refining the essence blood of the Eternal Master, if you refine it now, you will explode and die, and you will not be able to bear the secret of swallowing. "

"If you do that, get one more Realm Master, and hopefully slay the weaker Eternal Master. "

Ye Tian was enlightened this time, but he didn't expect that after becoming a half-step eternal master, there was still room for improvement.

If it weren't for what the Half-Tooth Controller said, he wouldn't know at all, maybe one day 703 would attack the Eternal Master, and he would have missed this great opportunity.

"Thank you for the mention!" Ye Tian said gratefully.

At this moment, the half-tooth wielder pulled out a map.

Some places in the boundary river are recorded above.

The half-tooth master nodded: "What you need to improve most at the moment is the control of the Supreme Legendary Body, I suggest you go to the end of the realm, the end of the realm is a gathering place for the life of the boundary river, many peak legendary realm lords and half-step eternal masters like to go there, there is a battlefield, many peak legendary realm lords and half-step eternal masters have fallen clones from time to time, but you have cultivated the secret of swallowing, there are enough life of the boundary river there to help you cultivate the secret of swallowing." Moreover, after countless battles and life and death grinding, it helps to control his supreme legendary body. "

"The End of the World, why haven't I heard of it before?"

Ye Tian was surprised.

He knew that in order to inquire about the life essence and blood of the Boundary River, he also knew a lot of information, why didn't he know the end of the Realm?

If he had known, he would have gone long ago.

The half-tooth master smiled and said, "You are only a fifth-level peak Legendary Realm Lord, you know limited information, do you know how big the boundary river is? No, you don't know." The reason why the boundary river is called a river is because it is really a river. The Boundary River has a source, and only the Eternal Masters are eligible to enter it, and it is called the Origin Boundary Sea. The Origin Boundary Sea is connected to the eighty-eight boundary rivers, and we belong to the thirteenth boundary river here. It's a secret, but it doesn't hurt to tell you in advance. "

"As for the Wall of the Realm, it is a special area between the Thirteenth Boundary River and the Twelfth Boundary River, and it is impossible to enter the Boundary without the guidance of the Eternal Master. The entrance to the Boundary Divine Mountain is in the Boundary God Mountain, I will give you a token, you can go to the Boundary God Mountain, and the caretakers there will not stop you. "

Speaking of a token, it was engraved with a half-toothed sigil.

This token represents the Half-Tooth Master.

"Thank you, Halftooth Master!"

Ye Tian thanked again.

"There are still some treasures on the map I gave you, you can all go and see them, they will help you in your cultivation. "

Then, the half-tooth master departed.

Ye Tian put away the map and token, and soon after, he sent a copy body to the Realm God Mountain.

Ye Tian didn't know much about the Realm God Mountain, he also investigated it, and he didn't know much information, it should be the eternal controllers who controlled the spread of news, so not many people knew.

However, outsiders are not allowed to enter the Boundary God Mountain, which is information that can be detected.

But now, Ye Tian has the token of the half-tooth master, so he can naturally enter the Realm God Mountain.

Soon, Ye Tian came to the Realm God Mountain.

The only special time and space in the Realm God Mountain, where the magic circle is densely packed, and there is only a huge portal that can lead to the Realm God Mountain.

However, there are two stone beings stationed here, guarding the Boundary Sacred Mountain.

Ye Tian sensed the aura of a half-step Eternal Controller from these two stone beings, but he was also an Eternal Master.

They are not supposed to be real beings, but are made by the Eternal Masters at a cost.

"Stop, the Boundary God Mountain does not allow outsiders to enter. "

One of them, a stone man with a bull's head, said in a cold voice.

Wow!

Ye Tian took out the token from the half-tooth controller.

I saw that the stone man's pupils emitted two rays of light, and he glanced at the token of the half-tooth controller, and after confirming that it was correct, he got out of the way: "Please come in!"

"Hmm!"

Ye Tian put away the token and flew directly into the Realm God Mountain.

The Boundary God Mountain is very large, and there is also a huge city here, the Boundary God City.

But there are almost no weak people in this city, the weakest are all fifth-level peak Legendary Realm Lords, and there are many half-step Eternal Masters, and all of them have unusual backgrounds, because they are not qualified to enter here at all.

Anyone who is qualified to come here has something to do with the Eternal Master.

Ye Tian took a brief look, there were too many shops in the Realm God City, and transactions were prevalent here.

"It should be the Boundary Divine Mountain connecting the end of the realm, the resources of the end of the realm are afraid that there are a lot, and the fighting is very serious, many peak legend realm lords return from the end of the realm, and they will trade a lot of treasures, so the trade here is so popular. "

Ye Tian said darkly.

He didn't stay in the Realm God City for long, and soon went to the end of the realm.

A long gray river not far to the west of the Realm God City is the entrance to the end of the realm.

Ye Tian originally thought that he would enter the end of the realm through some kind of teleportation door, but now it seems that he has thought too much.

Wow!

Ye Tian entered the Gray Long River, and the terrifying pressure hit, if he didn't have the strength of the Fifth Rank Peak Legendary Realm Lord, he really couldn't pass through this Gray Long River.

Ye Tian moved along the long gray river, and every step was a long distance.

Suddenly.

Ye Tian sensed a layer of barrier in the dark.

"Boundary River Barrier!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

According to the half-tooth master, this should be the barrier of the thirteenth boundary river, and after passing through this barrier, you can leave the thirteenth boundary river.

Under normal circumstances, the Peak Legendary Realm Lord would naturally not be able to leave the Boundary River, but the Boundary River barrier here is very fragile, even if it is a fifth-level Peak Legendary Realm Lord, he can pass through.

"Broken!"

Ye Tian smashed the barrier of the Boundary River with one punch and entered another area in an instant.

This is the end of the world!_
